---
title: Temple japonais
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557480/japon_20231205_xzqpum.png
description: Temple japonais, cours de savoir dessiner, crayons aquarellables
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/12/05
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557480/japon_20231205_xzqpum.png)
